title: Progress EK5234PTEAL Go Bake Stand Mixer- Large Electric Whisk with 4L Stainless Steel Bowl, 8 Speeds and Pulse Function, Mixing Beater, Dough Hook, and Whisk Attachments, Splash Guard, 1300W, Teal
features: Add a stylish touch of colour to your kitchen with this teal Go Bake! Electric Stand Mixer from Progress, perfect for cakes and bread.
Boasting a convenient 8 speed settings including pulse function; ensures you have the perfect consistency when making homemade treats.
Including a 4 litre stainless steel bowl with safety lock, the 1300 W mixer also has a splash guard to keep your kitchen clean and tidy.
Perfect for beginners and advanced chefs, the stand mixer includes a convenient beater, whisk and dough hook for happy family baking.
The beater and dough hook attachments are perfect for mixing dough and cake batter whilst the whisk attachment is ideal for making meringues and whipping cream.
description: Product Description Previous page Tasty Treats With 8 convenient speeds settings, make cakes, tarts, breads and savoury snacks at your leisure. Touch of Colour Designed with a striking teal colour, adding style and finesse to any kitchen collection. Interchangeable Hooks Includes a beater, whisk and dough hook, ensuring all mixtures are oven ready. Safety Lock Made with a safety lock and splash guard ensuring your kitchen is kept clean and tidy. Next page 1 Tasty Treats 2 Touch of Colour 3 Interchangeable Hooks 4 Safety Lock Progress Go Bake! Stand Mixer Get creative with the whole family with the Electric Stand Mixer from Progress; bake tasty treats and delicious meals. Finished with a gorgeous teal design, the stand mixer looks perfect on any kitchen worktop. Progress Go Bake!
